pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which generates this file using ImageMagick.
Code analysis and web search. The URL for the .pli file returns a 404, triggering the fallback in setup_task.sh that creates a synthetic image at /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.png instead.
Code analysis of export_result.sh which defines OUTPUT_DIR and checks this exact path.
Code analysis of verifier.py which checks if video_size > 10000 bytes (10KB).

privileged_info_summary: The nametag asset is synthetically generated at /home/ga/Desktop/nametag.png. The character sample file claimed as dwanko_run.pli is incorrect; due to a broken download link, the setup script generates a synthetic image at /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.png instead. The final rendered video must be saved to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/rigged_run.mp4, and the verifier expects its file size to be strictly greater than 10,000 bytes (10 KB).
